_publications._publicationTitle: Identifying Symptoms of Distress in Youth Living with Neurofibromatosis Type 1 (NF1).

_contextSnippet: The average performance status score was...85.9 for those 18 and over. Ratings for patients over 18 were not significantly related to performance status
